welcome.title: Welcome to TunaOS
welcome.description: TunaOS is an immutable, container-native Linux operating system built for enterprise workstations and developers.

features.title: Container-Native Workflow
features.description: Utilize atomic updates, bootc containers, and transactional layers to keep your system safe and predictable.

community.title: Need Help?
community.description: Find resources, documentation, and the issue tracker at repo.tunaos.org.

completed.title: Installation Finished
completed.description: Reboot your machine to enter your new TunaOS workstation environment!
